input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule VE.2.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ve.2.3.1
            TITLE: each team must have two or more fire extinguishers.

            CONTENT:
            rule VE.2.3.1: Each team must have two or more fire extinguishers.
VE.2.3.1 Each team must have two or more fire extinguishers.   
a. One extinguisher must readily be available in the team’s paddock area 
b. One extinguisher must accompany the vehicle when moved using the push bar  
A commercially available on board fire system may be used instead of the fire 
extinguisher that accompanies the vehicle

final_answer: rule VE.2.3.1: Each team must have two or more fire extinguishers. VE.2.3.1 Each team must have two or more fire extinguishers. a. One extinguisher must readily be available in the team’s paddock area b. One extinguisher must accompany the vehicle when moved using the push bar A commercially available on board fire system may be used instead of the fire extinguisher that accompanies the vehicle
